name: instagram
description: Installable platform provider for Instagram posts, reels, and profiles.

search.description: Search for Instagram posts and reels via the search_web SERP chain. Results depend on external search indexing, not Instagram's own search.

fetch.description: Fetch an Instagram post or reel. Returns author, caption, like/comment counts, and preview image. Comments are NOT available. Supports /p/ and /reel/ URLs.

Fetch an Instagram profile. Returns name, handle, bio, follower/following/post counts, profile picture, verification status, and up to 12 latest post/reel URLs. Requires a browser session. Pass a profile URL like instagram.com/username.
